A dummy text server that can’t render text or manage fonts.
Framework to write Godot Game Extensions using the Swift Programming Language.
Types that conform to VariantRepresentable can be stored directly in
with no conversion.  These include all of the Variant types from Godot (for
SwiftGodot.Object) as well as the built-in Swift types UInt8, Int64 and Double.
An advanced text server with support for BiDi, complex text layout, and contextual OpenType features. Used in Godot by default.
Optional, implement if font supports extra spacing or baseline offset.
is not equal to zero, emboldens the font outlines. Negative values reduce the outline thickness.
A server interface for font management and text rendering.
